news.title: Why The FLSmidth (CPSE:FLS) Story Is Shifting As Pump Strength Meets Valuation Doubts
news.summary: FLSmidth’s fair value estimate in the updated model moves from DKK 566.36 to DKK 583.33, while JPMorgan’s separate decision to cut its price target by DKK 40 shows that views on upside potential are not aligned.
